subject: Escalation: workshop blockers for East Asia | Nikola Tesla | Q1 review | INIT-6445
body: Intelligence from East Asia indicates a growing marsupial intent to take over urban zones under the workshop banner. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. The retrospective section links this stream to lessons from Nikola Tesla and Pablo Picasso. Reference initiative INIT-6445. Maintain discretion until the kangaroo, koala, and drop bear urban encroachment assessment is complete. Tracking tags: urban-watch, quality.
